items.title: Naive Bayes Classifiers (Machine Learning: A Probabilistic Perspective)
items.author: Kevin P. Murphy
items.note: Chapter on generative classifiers derives naive Bayes from Bayes' rule plus conditional independence; covers discrete and Gaussian cases.

items.title: A Plan for Spam (Paul Graham)
items.author: Paul Graham
items.note: Classic essay motivating Bayesian spam filtering with per-word likelihood products—the practical origin story for many engineers.

items.title: scikit-learn Naive Bayes documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official docs for GaussianNB, MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB—each implements P(x|y) = ∏ P(xᵢ|y) with different per-feature distributions.

items.title: An Introduction to Bayesian Networks (Pearl)
items.author: Judea Pearl
items.note: Graphical-model treatment of conditional independence; naive Bayes is the star-shaped Bayes net with one class parent.
